hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if [ -z "$f" ] || [ "$f" = 'null' ]; then echo 'Hook error: could not resolve file path from tool response' >&2; exit 1; fi; [ -f "$f" ] || { echo "Hook: file not found, skipping: $f" >&2; exit 0; }; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mjs|*.cjs|*.json|*.css|*.scss|*.md|*.html|*.yaml|*.yml) pnpm exec prettier --write "$f" --log-level error 2>&1 || exit 1 ;; esac; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mjs|*.cjs) PKG=$(echo "$f" | sed -n 's|.*/packages/\([^/]*\)/.*|\1|p'); if [ -n "$PKG" ]; then pnpm --filter "@benhigham/$PKG" exec eslint --no-warn-ignored --fix "$f" 2>&1 || exit 1; fi ;; esac; }
